description: This file is a frontend React component (Next.js) page that displays detailed information about an insurance claim, including claim details, fraud score, fraud signals, and a relationship network visualization. It also provides actions such as re-scoring the claim and assigning it.

methods.name: ClaimDetailPage
methods.description: Main React component rendering the claim detail page, managing state, data loading, and user interactions.

methods.name: loadData
methods.description: Asynchronous function to fetch claim details, signals, and network data in parallel.

methods.name: handleRescore
methods.description: Function to trigger re-scoring of the claim and reload data.

methods.name: DetailRow
methods.description: Helper React component to render a labeled icon with claim detail information.
